chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.263 of 2019 M/s Terry Towellers (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Hashmi Impex (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 269/20 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on CMA 562/20 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 563/20 Dated: 21.02.2024 None present. -.-.- On the last date it was noticed that this appeal is barred by time (five days). Record however reveals that appellant’s counsel is not attending the matter since last few dates. On the first date a week’s time was granted for compliance followed by another extension for seven days on 04.11.2019. Two weeks’ time was then granted on 04.02.2022 followed by absence of the counsel on 12.05.2023 and on the last when limitation point was also noted. Today is sixth date when neither appellant’s counsel has appeared nor any intimation is available. In view of above instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
